## Checklist

- [ ] Frontmatter is valid (`title:`, `date-created:`, tags in CamelCase)
- [ ] No wikilinks (`[[...]]`) — use `[text](relative/path.md)`
- [ ] No loose `.md` files at discipline roots
- [ ] Style guide followed (`content/writing/texts/style-guide.md`)
- [ ] AI-generated content has been reviewed and revised
